content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.6.1/5.6.3 WARN — RatingGateView.swift gates users by star rating before showing a review action, routing only 4-5 star users to a hardcoded `itms-apps://.../write-review` link while diverting lower ratings to a feedback form, and description.txt explicitly asks users to "rate us 5 stars" (App/RatingGateView.swift:1-24, fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt:1).

Pierre: This is a textbook 5.6.1 dark pattern — Apple requires using `SKStoreReviewController`/`requestReview()` so *all* users see the same system-provided prompt, and explicitly disallows custom review UI that filters users by sentiment or links directly to the write-review URL. It also erodes review authenticity (touching on 5.6.3) since only happy users are funneled to leave public ratings. Fix: replace this custom gate with the standard `requestReview()` API shown to all users regardless of star input, and drop "rate us 5 stars" language from the description.
